# Generic → Generic Linear and Pack

*Auto-generated from CEVA-XC4500 Vec-C Intrinsics documentation*

---

Main table → Generic → Generic Linear and Pack

Generic Linear and Pack

Instruction Type and Width       Instruction description
                                 Performs configurable linear and packing operation between
                                 three sources using CISA. The multiplicands and addends are
                                 user configured according to the configuration register set. The
Vector Generic Linear and Pack
                                 sources are 16-bit and 8-bit wide. The addition results are 16-bit
                                 wide and are packed into either 32-bit or 40-bit according to the
                                 register type.
